title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 21.180 - No allowance, except per diem
text:
21.180.  No allowance, except per diem. — No allowance or emolument for any purpose shall be paid to any officer, agent, servant or employee of either house of the general assembly, or of any committee thereof, except the per diem provided by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 12867, A. 1949 H.B. 2156, A.L. 1957 p. 595) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11242; 1919 § 7117; 1909 § 8116
